title: Everwind
description: Based on the video game Everwind | Everwind is a medieval-style modpack set in a world of floating islands, ancient dungeons, and dragons.
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/EVERWIND/MP_EVERWIND_Header.webp) Everwind is a medieval-style modpack inspired by the new game Everwind — a world of floating islands, ancient dungeons, and dragons. Step into a high-fantasy realm where the skies are filled with mystery, and every island holds new challenges, treasures, and stories to uncover. ### **Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?**

I recommend **[Bisect Hosting](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code **[to get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/flashh)** on your purchase. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/EVERWIND/MP_EVERWIND_Description.webp) 🗺️ Exploration and Structures With Explorify, Towns & Towers, and Medieval Buildings, the world is filled with floating villages, ancient ruins, and castles lost to time. 🐉 Dragons and Mythical Creatures Ice and Fire: Dragons and Naturalist bring the world to life with flying beasts and wild encounters. Hunt them, tame them — or flee before their fire. ⚔️ Smooth and Dynamic Combat Better Combat and Fantasy Weapons & Armor overhaul fights, making every swing and dodge feel responsive and impactful. Roll, block, and strike your way through epic battles. 🔮 The Aether Realms Travel beyond the clouds with The Aether and Deep Aether, discovering new dimensions full of ruins, dungeons, and celestial landscapes. 💀 Dungeons and Challenges Dungeon Crawl, Illager Invasion, and Better Archeology add ruins, strongholds, and bosses hidden across the floating world, waiting for the brave to uncover them. 🏗️ Immersive Building and Design Conquest Reforged, Diagonal Walls, Medieval Paintings, and Immersive Lanterns let you craft true medieval architecture — bridges between islands, sky fortresses, or small floating farms. 🌄 Atmosphere and Sound AmbientSounds, Visuality, Presence Footsteps, and Medieval Music create an immersive environment full of life, wind, and distant echoes across the skies. 🤝 Multiplayer Ready Designed to run smoothly on servers and small communities. Mods ensure a stable multiplayer experience with synchronized combat, exploration, and world generation. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/EVERWIND/MP_EVERWIND_Screenshots.webp) ![screenshtos 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UgamOoJo/images/c18af1691c57d8d48ac700cbe95ae66c6e4d8a89.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UgamOoJo/images/b0e3d8a07e2b23d841481c9ac1d8fd14aafb88f8.png)
